notes: Catalog entries define reusable terrain assets for the Leaflet map editor, Turn Counter integration, and future solo simulation.
This file defines WHAT each image is. Per-map placement should live in terrain_instances.json later.
Some names are intentionally generic in the first batch where the art is clear in function but not specific enough yet for exact named building identity.
location_tags are the bridge to 150_location_types.json later.

visibility.blocks_los_when: Partially blocks line of sight through the tent body

interactions.name: Search Tent
interactions.on_success: Gain 1 Loot token or 1 Supply token.

breakpoints.effect: Tent collapses and becomes open difficult ground.

notes: Replace with torn canvas and debris.

interactions.on_success: Gain 3 lore tokens and 1 Thyr token. Ancient power lingers here.
interactions.on_fail: Something watches from the carvings. Test Morale.

interactions.name: Fall Check
interactions.on_success: Avoid the pit edge.
interactions.on_fail: Fall in. Lose next activation. Test to climb out.

slots.label: Pit
notes: Fall hazard. Units ending move here must test.

interactions.name: Fall Check
interactions.on_success: Avoid the pit edge.
interactions.on_fail: Fall in. Lose next activation. Take 1 damage. Test Quality 3 to climb out.

interactions.name: Fall Check
interactions.on_success: Avoid the pit edge.
interactions.on_fail: Fall in. Lose next activation. Take 1 damage. Test Quality 3 to climb out.

slots.label: Large Pit
notes: Large fall hazard. Cannot cross without fly or leap.

interactions.name: Navigate Pit Field
interactions.on_success: Cross carefully. Move at half speed this activation.
interactions.on_fail: Fall into one of the pits. Lose next activation and take 1 damage.

slots.label: Pit Field
notes: Area hazard covering multiple pits. Treat entire footprint as hazardous ground.
